title: Frame Object Results
description:
Frame Object Results

Frame Object Results

The details for each result used with Frame objects are explained in the Vision Guide 8.0 Properties and Results Reference Manual.  However, for convenience we have provided a list of the Frame object results and a brief explanation of each below:

Results	Description

Angle	Returns the
		 amount of rotation of the Frame.

Found	Returns whether
		 or not the frame could be defined.
